team_news: Thomas Partey's emergency Canadian visa appeal was rejected, so Ghana proceed without him for the Panama opener.
Carlos Queiroz said Ghana would adapt to the cards available.
Panama are expected to rely on defensive organization, likely 5-4-1 principles, and Adalberto Carrasquilla's long passing and creativity.

historical_structural: Ghana and Panama have never met before.
Ghana's best World Cup result is the 2010 quarter-finals; Panama's only prior World Cup was 2018.
With England and Croatia also in Group L, this opener is central to third-place and best-third calculations.
